channel.title: Updates & News on MRinRT Symposium 2025
channel.description: Recent content in Updates & News on MRinRT Symposium 2025

item.title: Thank You for a Wonderful MRinRT 2026
item.description:
Thank you to everyone who participated in the 12th MR in RT Symposium.
It was a pleasure to welcome researchers, clinicians, industry partners, and students from around the world for inspiring presentations, engaging discussions, and valuable networking.

We are grateful to all speakers, presenters, sponsors, and attendees whose contributions made this year's symposium a great success. The enthusiasm and collaboration within the MR-guided radiotherapy community continue to drive innovation and strengthen our field.

item.title: IMPORTANT: Remember to Register!
item.description:
Please register as soon as possible to the meeting to secure a spot!

Registration

item.title: Registration is Now Open
item.description:
Registration for the 12th MRI in RT symposium is now open.
Registration closes: April 30, 2026

Registration

item.title: Abstract Deadline Extended
item.description:
The deadline for submitting your original contributions in the field of MR simulation and MR-guided radiotherapy to the 12th MR in RT symposium, has been extended to January 22, 2026.

  • Extended Abstract Submission Deadline: January 22, 2026

item.title: Call for Abstracts
item.description:
We invite you to submit your original contributions in the field of MR simulation and MR-guided radiotherapy to the 12th MR in RT symposium, which will take place on June 17-19th, 2026 at Odense Concert Hall - Comwell H.C. Andersen in Odense, Denmark.

Important Dates

  • Abstract Submission Opens: November 18, 2025
  • Extended Abstract Submission Deadline: January 22, 2026
  • Anticipated Notification Date: Mid March, 2026

Abstract Information
